before.algorithm: intersection: progression candidate keys INTERSECT level-modifier eligible keys, resolved via drift-prone FindWorkout(key)
before.longRunStandardResult: never included -- eligible per level modifier but never a progression candidate

after.algorithm: union: exact WorkoutProgression.WorkoutCandidates UNION exact LevelModifier.EligibleWorkouts, resolved via exact FindWorkout(key,version)

liveBundleComparison.onlyDifference: LONG_RUN_STANDARD v2, added purely through eligibility, zero progression change

thirdClosureSourceReason: Union of progression candidates + level-modifier eligible workouts was already sufficient; WorkoutClosureResolver is structured to allow a third source to be added later without disturbing the first two.

historicalEraPreserved.mechanism: ValidateLayoutCoverage is a no-op for legacy (schemaVersion 1) graphs, gated by WorkoutClosureResolver.IsExactShape
